foldl_add_reverse:
```lean
theorem foldl_add_reverse (l : List Score) (init : Score) :
    l.reverse.foldl Score.add init = l.foldl Score.add init := by
  induction' l with x xs ih generalizing init
  · rfl
  · simp [List.reverse_cons, List.foldl_append, List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    have h : ∀ (xs : List Score) (s : Score), (xs.reverse.foldl Score.add s) = (xs.foldl Score.add s) := by
      intro xs s
      exact ih s
    rw [h]
    simp
    have helper : ∀ (xs : List Score) (s t : Score), (xs.foldl Score.add (s.add t)) = (xs.foldl Score.add s).add t := by
      intro xs
      induction' xs with y ys ih' generalizing s t
      · simp
      · simp [ih' (s.add t) y, Score.add_assoc]
    rw [helper xs init x]
    simp [Score.add_comm, Score.add_assoc]
pathCost_reverse:
```lean
theorem pathCost_reverse (p : Path) : pathCost (p.reversePath) = pathCost p := by
  unfold pathCost reversePath
  simp
  induction p generalizing ?_ with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons e es ih =>
    simp [pathCost, List.foldl, List.reverseAux, List.map, AdmissibilityEdge.reverse]
    rw [ih]
    simp [pathCost, List.foldl]
    rfl
```
shellMass_max_at_midpoint:
```lean
theorem shellMass_max_at_midpoint (k : Nat) :
    let n := k * k + k
    shellMass n = k * (k + 1) := by
  intro n
  unfold shellMass
  have h_sqrt : Nat.sqrt n = k := by
    apply Nat.sqrt_eq_iff_mul_self_eq
    · have : k * k ≤ n := by
        nlinarith
      exact this
    · have : n < (k + 1) * (k + 1) := by
        nlinarith
      exact this
  rw [h_sqrt]
  have h_a : n - k * k = k := by
    unfold n
    nlinarith
  have h_b : (k + 1) * (k + 1) - n = k + 1 := by
    unfold n
    nlinarith
  rw [h_a, h_b]
  ring
```
